CVE-2020-23914.title: An issue was discovered in cpp-peglib through v0.1.12. A NULL poi ...
CVE-2020-23914.description: An issue was discovered in cpp-peglib through v0.1.12. A NULL pointer dereference exists in the peg::AstOptimizer::optimize() located in peglib.h. It allows an attacker to cause Denial of Service.
